titleStmt.title: SII 37.359A: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 359A. (A.R. No. B 1 of 1941-42.) Appikoṇḍa, Visakhapatnam Taluk and District.

summary.p: Pillar in the temple of Veṅkaṭēśvarasvāmi.
This is dated Śaka 1550, Vibhava, Jyēshṭhā śu. 15, Friday, corresponding to 1628 A.D., June 6.

It records the foundation of certain temples at Kaikalūru alias Kaiṅkaryapura and gifts of lands made to them and their establishments by Khaṇḍērāya of the Kūḍalge family, who was a Madhva of the Kāṇva-śākhā.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatāṁ sakaḷa bhu
vana mānavyasanavyasagōtrāṇā
ṁhārīta putrāṇāṁ kaṁsakīvara
prasādalabdha rājyānāṁ mā
trugaṇanaparipālitābhā
ṁ svāmi mahābhagavaṁ
tu nārāyaṇa prasādata
śvētātapatra piṁchakuṁta
siṁhvāsadrana kanakadaṁḍa
gaṁgāyamunādi rājya cihnā
nāṁ varavarāhalāṁcanēkṣa
ṇa kṣaṇāvasikṛtānāṁ Aśva
mēdhānāṁ prabhriti jala

pavitrīgātrāṇāṁ cāḷu
kyānāṁ kulamalaṁkaruṣyātparamamā
hēśvara paramabraṁhmaṁṇya śrī ci
llīśvara śrīmahādēvara labda pā
dapadmāśraya Anaṁtalakṣmīśvara sa
rvvalōkāśraya śrīviṣṇuvarddhana mahā
rājulaina Upēṁdradēva cakrava
rttulu tamataṁḍri koppayadē
vacakravarttikiṁ buṇyamugā
nu Appakoṁḍa śrī sōmēśvaradē
vara The Inscription stops
Digital edition of SII 37.359A by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
